headings.teacherSubtitle: Here's what's happening across your exams today.
headings.studentSubtitle: Here's your exam schedule and progress.

hero.headline: The Smarter Way to Run <highlight>Secure</highlight> Online Exams
hero.subheading: AI-powered proctoring, automatic question generation, and real-time analytics — all in one trusted platform.

features.heading: Everything you need, built in
features.subheading: A complete toolkit for secure, intelligent online examinations — without stitching together five different tools.

aiProctoring.title: AI Proctoring
aiProctoring.description: Detects face absence, multiple people, gaze deviation, and background audio in real time, with enforced fullscreen and tab-lock — all running on-device.

autoQuestionGeneration.title: Auto Question Generation
autoQuestionGeneration.description: Generate exam-ready questions with Claude from your own course material, aligned to specific learning objectives and reviewed before they go live.

realTimeMonitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
realTimeMonitoring.description: Watch every active exam from one dashboard, get instant violation alerts, and snapshot, warn, or force-submit a student's session in a click.

advancedAnalytics.title: Advanced Analytics
advancedAnalytics.description: Facility index, discrimination index, and reliability stats computed per exam, plus a per-student trust score built from every proctoring signal.

instantResults.title: Instant Results
instantResults.description: Objective questions are scored the moment an exam is submitted; essay and coding answers get an AI-suggested grade a teacher confirms before it counts.

deepDive.heading: Built around how exams actually run
deepDive.subheading: Four core systems power every exam on Evalix, end to end.

questionGeneration.title: AI-Powered Question Generation
questionGeneration.description: Point Evalix at your course material and Claude drafts exam-ready questions across multiple formats — MCQ, essay, coding, and more — tagged to the right learning objective and held as drafts until a teacher approves them.

proctoring.title: Real-Time Proctoring
proctoring.description: Face presence, multiple-face detection, gaze tracking, background audio, fullscreen enforcement, and tab-switch detection all run locally in the browser and report violations the moment they happen.

monitoring.title: Live Monitoring Dashboard
monitoring.description: Teachers see every student's status update live, review flagged moments with full context, and can send a warning, capture a snapshot, or force-submit — all from one screen.

multiTenant.title: Multi-Tenant, Role-Based Access
multiTenant.description: Every institution gets its own isolated space, with dedicated permissions for students, teachers, admins, and a platform-wide super-admin tier.

points.p1: Proctoring runs on-device — raw video and audio are never uploaded, only violation events.
points.p2: AI never finalizes a grade by itself — every essay and coding score needs a teacher's confirmation.
points.p3: Every institution's data is isolated, with role-based access enforced for students, teachers, and admins.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subheading: Get from sign-up to a live proctored exam in minutes

s1.title: Register your institution
s1.desc: Sign up and invite teachers instantly via secure email links.

s2.title: Create & configure exams
s2.desc: Build question banks manually or let AI generate questions from your documents.

s3.title: Monitor in real time
s3.desc: Watch live status, receive violation alerts, and review trust scores after exams.

cta.heading: Ready to modernize your exams?
cta.subheading: Join institutions running secure, AI-proctored exams with Evalix. Set up your first exam in under three minutes.

footer.tagline: AI-powered proctoring and exam generation for institutions.
